div.style: width: 200px; height: 200px; background: transparent; border-radius: 50%; overflow: visible;
text-align: center; margin-top: 5px; font-size: 10px; color: #999; font-style: italic;
flex: 1; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 12px; padding: 15px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
max-height: 250px; overflow-y: auto; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 8px;

div.t-att-style: msg.type === 'bot' ? 'background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; margin: 8px 0; padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 12px; max-width: 85%; float: left; clear: both;' : 'background: #e3f2fd; color: #333; margin: 8px 0; padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 12px; max-width: 85%; float: right; clear: both;'

button.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #667eea; color: #667eea; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
background: white; border: 1px solid #667eea; color: #667eea; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
background: white; border: 1px solid #667eea; color: #667eea; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
background: white; border: 1px solid #667eea; color: #667eea; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;

input.style: flex: 1; padding: 10px 15px; border: 2px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s;

button.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; transition: transform 0.2s;
